name: appstore-manager
description: App Store localization manager — multi-store ASC metadata, screenshots and AI translation on Firebase

scripts.dev: concurrently -n emu,fn,web -c blue,yellow,green "pnpm emulators" "pnpm --filter functions build:watch" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter functions build && pnpm --filter web build
